name: Ugly Cute's Gift
description:
This spiky, stony fragment shed from Ugly Cute's carapace fits comfortably over the hand. Though a little bulkier than the typical gauntlet, it still functions as a +1 spiked gauntlet.

Activate—Ugly Cute's Favor 2 (concentrate, manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You draw upon Ugly Cute's latent spiritual energy to infuse the gauntlet with forceful power. For 1 minute, Ugly Cute's gift gains the advantages of a property rune and deals an additional 2 spirit damage on a successful Strike.
